name: sushidata-gtm
description: Sushidata is a context data lake for long-term AI memory. This plugin turns Claude into a Sushidata-native agent: ingest community signals from Discord, Slack, and forums; run GTM prospecting and outbound with HeyReach and Apify; build competitor battlecards for PMMs; analyze campaign performance with research swarms; discover ICP signals from won/lost account data; and generate personalized outreach copy. Every finding is saved to the Sushidata context lake so future sessions have full memory of what was learned.
